judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a newspaper clipping, but Description B adds specific visual details (headline, subheadline, sidebar text) that Description A omits, without contradicting the core visual element.

gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned document page with a pasted newspaper clipping headline “Mysterious Object Amazes Saucer Skeptic,” handwritten notes and initials, a right-side list of names with blank lines, and a date stamp near the bottom reading “10-9-57.”*
